title: Fixed Anvil
description: A small improvement to the anvil.
body:
### About

**This mod is a standalone module featuring selected mechanics originally designed for the Expected mod.**
While not a part of Expected itself, the content included here has been extracted from it to allow players more control over which gameplay changes they want to apply. The mechanics aim to enhance game balance, increase difficulty, and provide logical updates to underused or overly powerful systems—all while maintaining the vanilla Minecraft spirit.

### [Give me a dollar (ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/swproducts)

#### Modified Anvil Repair Principle  
[Video clip](https://youtube.com/clip/UgkxQgS2TU5ujOxmAH6RXs-cgpi7opjS2iq0?si=FqQwU1Kle2w87Qw5)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3ec2f1d0a785ab8d00d33fe6102c5052658a3bc.png)

The maximum repair cost for any item via the anvil is now capped at 25 levels.
